facebook.caption: POV: you walked down Trần Hưng Đạo looking for coffee and found a 4.9-star brunch spot with 318 reviews. Là-Men Coffee & Brunch Phu Quoc is the kind of place locals quietly keep returning to. Good coffee. Solid brunch. Zero tourist-trap energy. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
